HEADROOM // DESKTOP

Headroom

Starting the bundled engine…

connecting

HEADROOM // SIGNED UPDATE

Update available

HEADROOM // SETTINGS

$ headroom configure

Validated locally, committed atomically, and applied to both desktop surfaces.

[APPEARANCE]
[ROUTING + COLLECTION]
[PROVIDER TOOLS]
[DESKTOP]

Login launch is off until explicitly enabled.

[NOTIFICATIONS // PREPARED]

Native Notification Center alerts are opt-in and remain off by default. Headroom alerts only from current verified readings, once per threshold crossing; held or stale accounts stay silent.

⌘, settings · ⌘R refresh · ⌘W close · ⌘Q quit

HEADROOM // DIAGNOSTICS

$ headroom health --redacted

Stable codes only. No account identity, provider output, paths, credentials, prompts, or conversation content.

Loading bounded health…

[SUPPORT REPORT INVENTORY]

Inventory unavailable until health loads.

Review this exact inventory before saving. Private recovery backups are never included.

HEADROOM // ROUTING

$ headroom route --explain

The bundled engine selects the account and explains every skip using the CLI’s final safety gates.

Choose a model family to prove its current route.

[ENGINE SELECTION] No eligible account

$ headroom status

Waiting for a sanitized snapshot

+ add account
